name: Communities Foundation of Texas
description_short: Communities Foundation of Texas is a credit repair provider based in Dallas, Texas. Rated 4.8/5 with 49 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Communities Foundation of Texas is a credit repair provider serving clients in Dallas, Texas. Carrying a 4.8/5.0 Google rating from 49 reviews, Communities Foundation of Texas has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Dallas area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a social services organization, Communities Foundation of Texas provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Dallas, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Communities Foundation of Texas operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Dallas, Texas area who are considering Communities Foundation of Texas should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
